items.title: Watch the World Play – Semi Finals
items.summary: Join fellow soccer fans at Mississauga Celebration Square for free public viewings of the FIFA World Cup 2026™ Semi Finals on the big screens.

items.title: Mississauga 3rd Annual Asian Night Market 2026
items.summary: Join us for the Mississauga 3rd Annual Asian Night Market 2026, returning to Square One Shopping Centre P6 from July 17 to 19, 2026.
items.venue: Square One Shopping Centre, P6 Parking Lot

items.title: Astronomy in Action
items.summary: Astronomy in Action is bringing a planetarium dome to Mississauga! Join this 360-degree immersive experience that turns the dome into a window to the universe.

items.title: RED FM Summer Bhangra Jam 2026
items.summary: Step into a celebration of Punjabi culture where music, movement, and community take centre stage. Driven by the infectious rhythms of Bhangra, this festival brings high-energy performances and non-stop vibes to the heart of summer.

items.title: Music of the World – A Tribute to the Beautiful Game
items.summary: Celebrate the excitement, passion, and global spirit of the world’s most beloved game!

items.title: Watch the World Play – Final Game
items.summary: Catch the excitement of the FIFA World Cup 2026™ Final at Mississauga Celebration Square on July 19 and experience the tournament’s biggest match surrounded by fellow fans on the big screens.

items.title: Bollywood Monster Mashup 2026
items.summary: Celebrate the energy and spectacle of Bollywood with one of the biggest South Asian festivals of the summer. From star-studded performances to non-stop music and dance, this is where entertainment takes centre stage.

items.title: ASD Band
items.summary: Join us for a special live performance featuring ASD Band , an award-winning group of four talented performers on the autism spectrum: vocalist Rawan Tuffaha , keyboardist Ron Adea , vocalist and lead guitarist Jackson Begley , and drumme…

items.title: Josh Warren's Groove Circus
items.summary: Join us for a performance by Josh Warren , a bassist, composer, and arranger originally from Victoria, BC.
